code: export const formatINR=amount=>{return new Intl.NumberFormat('en-IN',{style:'currency',currency:'INR',maximumFractionDigits:0}).format(amount);};export const formatDate=dateStr=>{return new Date(dateStr).toLocaleDateString('en-IN',{day:'2-digit',month:'short',year:'numeric'});};export const formatShort=amount=>{if(amount>=100000)return`₹${(amount/100000).toFixed(1)}L`;if(amount>=1000)return`₹${(amount/1000).toFixed(1)}K`;return`₹${amount}`;};
